# Docebo AgentHub — illustrative GTM run

This directory is a complete, end-to-end example run of the GTM Strategy Engine.

**Disclaimer:** This is an **independent, illustrative analysis** generated by the
engine from **publicly available information**, to demonstrate the system on a
real-world scenario. It is **not affiliated with, endorsed by, or commissioned by
Docebo**, and uses no confidential or insider information. All market figures and
recommendations are AI-generated and should be independently verified before any
real decision-making. "Docebo" and "Docebo AgentHub" are trademarks of their
respective owner and are used here for descriptive/analytical purposes only.

## Contents

- [`inputs/`](inputs/) — the product brief + scenario that drove this run
- [`outputs/`](outputs/) — final output per agent (JSON) + executive summary
- [`staging/`](staging/) — Agent 1's intermediate sub-agent research outputs
- [`review/`](review/) — human review notes per agent
- [`gtm-engine-full-output.md`](gtm-engine-full-output.md) — every agent's complete output in one file

Start with [`outputs/executive-summary.md`](outputs/executive-summary.md).
